programmes.show_description: Disaster film starring Sebastian Spence. When a deadly jet stream vortex unleashes tornadoes over Manhattan, a race begins to stop the storm before the city is torn apart. (2008)
How news bulletins used to look. The GREAT! network takes you back in time, remembering stories from this week back then.
Disaster film starring Sebastian Spence. When a deadly jet stream vortex unleashes tornadoes over Manhattan, a race begins to stop the storm before the city is torn apart. (2008)
Mannering and Cordelia travel to a Balkan state to broker an antiques deal with the widow of a former president. Once there they discover she is on the run from the newly installed dictator.
The team's latest investigation leads them to France where a series of incidents have taken place. Have the sites been specifically chosen or are they simply a coincidence (1/2) ?
Steed and Peel find themselves embroiled in a blackmail scheme that targets millionaires. Can they solve the case before someone really is killed?
An uplifting round-up of good news stories from the UK and around the world.
Gutsy western starring Lou Diamond Phillips. A decorated soldier returning home after the American Civil War finds that an evil land owner has taken over the town. (2008)
An uplifting round-up of good news stories from the UK and around the world.

Sheriff Hollister volunteers to escort a young visitor to see her uncle on a nearby ranch, only for him to seemingly disappear.
A famous English journalist writing about America's violent West, tries to hire a gunslinger to face Sheriff Hollister.
Victoria's efforts to overcome husband John Cannon's memory of his first wife are thwarted when Apaches lay siege to their ranch and she is kidnapped.
With many of the assailants accounted for, the team are faced with tracking down the surviving agents before they accomplish their mission of starting World War III (2/2) .
Peel finds herself in a picturesque village while searching for her missing friend, Major Croft. But will Peel unearth the truth about the villagers before she finds herself in danger?
After the Mona Lisa is stolen, Mannering is reluctantly compelled to act as authenticator by the thieves attempting to sell the most famous painting in the world.
Action thriller with Steven Seagal. After his friends are kidnapped, a mercenary is forced to break a crime lord's son out of jail. But is executing the mission enough to secure their freedom? (2006)

Tombstone's low water supply and inadequate fire fighting equipment leads RC Tuttle to start a campaign to encourage residents to move to Benson.
A rancher hires a gunfighter to protect him from the last member of a family that has waged a feud with the rancher.
John Cannon must decide whether to send his son to possible death to save their besieged ranch.
The Avengers travel to Canada on a mission to discover the identity of an important member of the KGB. Meanwhile, Purdey finds herself in grave danger when she is trapped inside a building.
The Avengers investigate the mysterious deaths of personnel working on a government project.
The Avengers investigate when a car carrying ministry officials to a meeting mysteriously disappears. Is the case linked to shrinking budgets, and will Steed come up short in this case?
A group of soldiers fight to survive when faced with a deadly battle at the Guadacanal. Starring John Travolta, Jim Cavieze, Adrien Brody, Sean Penn, Woody Harrelson, John Cusack. (1998)
